Love Constellation

Claim a real place in your private universe of love.

Reserve one star for your story. Add your names and memory, and keep it shining forever.

Finite supply: 10,000 stars onlyPublic profile for your memoryPerfect for gifts and anniversaries
Claim My Star✦

Why It Converts

Built to feel premium, rare, and unforgettable.

01

Your Star, Your Story

Your coordinate becomes a named star in your shared sky, reserved under your names and story.

02

Only 10,000 Coordinates

With a finite wall, every position gains rarity and emotional value over time.

03

Forever Visible

Your memory stays discoverable, shareable, and revisit-ready for every anniversary.

3-Step Flow

From idea to a live star in minutes.

Step 01

Choose your coordinate

Select the exact place in the galaxy map that represents your relationship.

Step 02

Craft your star profile

Add your names, date, photo, and message so your star feels truly personal.

Step 03

Activate your star

Complete checkout and publish instantly, so your story starts shining right away.

Choose your place in the constellation.

One coordinate. One memory. One star that belongs to your story.
